gravity_link: Mitochondrial biogenesis master regulator; determines energy SUPPLY capacity.
spine_curvature_link: Energy supply bottleneck during growth spurt contributes to AIS.

gravity_link: Insulin-like growth factor 1 receptor; mediates growth plate signaling under load.
spine_curvature_link: Signaling receptor for growth spurt rate; rapid growth linked to curve progression.

gravity_link: Growth hormone receptor; master regulator of adolescent growth spurt rate.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates the rate of spinal elongation; rapid growth is a risk factor for AIS.

gravity_link: BMAL1; circadian clock TF in intervertebral disc regulating metabolism.
spine_curvature_link: Circadian rhythm disruption linked to disc degeneration and scoliosis.

gravity_link: Connects ECM to cytoskeleton via DGC; essential for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Muscular dystrophies (e.g. LAMA2/DAG1) feature severe scoliosis. (PMC7545609)
justification: Critical muscle-ECM link; similar to DMD.

gravity_link: Connects cytoskeleton to ECM (costamere), protecting muscle from contraction-induced mechanical damage and gravity load.
spine_curvature_link: Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy patients have very high prevalence of severe, progressive scoliosis. (SciELO)
justification: Essential for maintenance of muscle tone against gravity; loss leads to collapse.

gravity_link: Regulates smooth/non-muscle motility and contractility via myosin phosphorylation.
spine_curvature_link: Genetic variants associated with AIS susceptibility. (DOI: 10.1007/s00586-011-2067-7)

gravity_link: Essential for proprioception, which provides the gravity reference frame for posture control.
spine_curvature_link: Loss of function mutations cause congenital scoliosis; asymmetric expression in paraspinal muscles in AIS. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1602812)
justification: Direct link between gravity sensing (proprioception) and spinal alignment.

gravity_link: FOP causative mutation (R206H) alters mechanosensing (stiffness sensing) and leads to heterotopic ossification.
spine_curvature_link: Fibrodysplasia Ossificans Progressiva (FOP) causes severe spinal fusion and deformities. (DOI: 10.1091/mbc.E18-05-0311)
justification: Direct causative mutation linking mechanosensing failure to catastrophic spinal ossification.

gravity_link: Essential for development of proprioceptive neurons (gravity sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Loss of function mutations cause congenital scoliosis due to lack of proprioceptive input. (Blecher et al., 2017)
justification: Primary driver of proprioceptive-dependent spinal alignment.
